name: Strawberry Coconut Yogurt
intro: A kid-friendly and good vegetarian yogurt for newbies. It’s beautiful and amazingly delicious! Good-for-you fats, antioxidants from the “super-berry” strawberry, naturally sweetened with dates. Psst—make some extra yogurt and pour it into ice cream molds and serve it as a refreshing and delicious frozen yogurt.
method: Remove the stones from the dates. In a food processor or blender, mix all the ingredients (except toppings) to a creamy consistency. Spoon into bowls and top with sliced fresh strawberries and bee pollen.
